---

Name: Feature request
About: Suggest an idea or enhancement for the NCC RGU Cadet Management System
Title: '[FEAT] '
Labels: enhancement
Assignees: 'CaptainCheetah978'

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when I have to manually export the attendance sheets to excel," or "There's no way to track which cadets have returned their uniforms.")

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. (e.g., "Add a 'Return Uniform' toggle button next to the Alumni status dropdown," or "Create a button on the Dashboard that automatically downloads a master PDF of all active cadets.")

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. (e.g., "I considered just using the 'Notes' section to write down who returned their uniform, but a dedicated toggle would be much faster.")

**Who is this feature for?**
- [ ] Cadets
- [ ] Senior Under Officers (SUO)
- [ ] Associate NCC Officers (ANO)
- [ ] System Administrators

**Additional context**
Add any other context, wireframes, or screenshots about the feature request here. (e.g., "This feature is needed before the annual training camp begins.")
